req.title: Immunization record
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-010 mandates that immunization records must have an administered date not in the future. The test suite applies Equivalence Partitioning to segment date inputs (past, today, future), Boundary Value Analysis to test the exact boundary (today vs. tomorrow), and Negative Path testing to verify 422 rejection of future dates. All tests are deterministic, use UTC/ISO8601 timestamps, and are independent of external state. Test[3] corrected: negative kind with NEG heuristic (not EP) to align logical consistency rule.

tests.name: test_immunization_past_date_accepted
actions: construct immunization payload with administered date 7 days ago
POST to /Immunization with valid FHIR-compliant JSON
capture response status and location header
trace: R-HLT-010: clinician records immunization → expected outcome: immunization stored
Equivalence class: date in past (valid partition)
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import json

def test_immunization_past_date_accepted():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    past_date = (datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=7)).isoformat() + 'Z'
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Immunization',
        'status': 'completed',
        'vaccineCode': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx', 'code': '207'}]},
        'patient': {'reference': 'Patient/P123'},
        'occurrenceDateTime': past_date
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Immunization', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f'Expected 200/201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}'
    assert 'id' in resp.json().get('resource', {}), 'Response missing resource ID'
    assert resp.json()['resource']['occurrenceDateTime'] == past_date

tests.name: test_immunization_today_date_accepted
actions: construct immunization payload with administered date = today (00:00 UTC)
POST to /Immunization with valid FHIR-compliant JSON
trace: R-HLT-010: date boundary at today → system must accept today
Boundary Value Analysis: lower inclusive boundary (today is valid, tomorrow is not)
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime
import json

def test_immunization_today_date_accepted():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    today = datetime.utcnow().replace(hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0).isoformat() + 'Z'
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Immunization',
        'status': 'completed',
        'vaccineCode': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx', 'code': '207'}]},
        'patient': {'reference': 'Patient/P124'},
        'occurrenceDateTime': today
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Immunization', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code in [200, 201], f'Expected 200/201 at boundary, got {resp.status_code}'
    assert 'resource' in resp.json() or 'id' in resp.json()

tests.name: test_immunization_future_date_rejected
actions: construct immunization payload with administered date = tomorrow
POST to /Immunization with valid structure but invalid date
capture response status and error details
expected: error message references future date validation
trace: R-HLT-010: error pathway → date > today must return 422
Negative Path: future date is invalid input (EP partition boundary violation)
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import json

def test_immunization_future_date_rejected():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    tomorrow = (datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat() + 'Z'
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Immunization',
        'status': 'completed',
        'vaccineCode': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx', 'code': '207'}]},
        'patient': {'reference': 'Patient/P125'},
        'occurrenceDateTime': tomorrow
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Immunization', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 422, f'Expected 422, got {resp.status_code}'
    err_body = resp.json()
    assert 'issue' in err_body, 'Missing FHIR OperationOutcome'
    assert any('future' in str(issue).lower() or 'date' in str(issue).lower() 
               for issue in err_body.get('issue', [])), 'Error message does not reference date validation'

tests.name: test_immunization_far_future_date_rejected
actions: construct immunization payload with administered date = 365 days in future
trace: R-HLT-010: negative path testing – all future dates (far future vs. tomorrow) should behave identically
Negative Path: confirms consistent rejection across future date partition
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_immunization_far_future_date_rejected():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>', 'Content-Type': 'application/fhir+json'}
    
    far_future = (datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat() + 'Z'
    payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Immunization',
        'status': 'completed',
        'vaccineCode': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx', 'code': '207'}]},
        'patient': {'reference': 'Patient/P126'},
        'occurrenceDateTime': far_future
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Immunization', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 422, f'Expected 422 for far future date, got {resp.status_code}'
